description_for_human: Generate, verify, and export IC layouts (GDSII/SVG/JSON) from natural language via a structured Layout DSL.
description_for_model: Use this tool to turn an IC-layout request into a verified GDSII layout. Do NOT generate geometry or GDS yourself. Instead, construct a Layout DSL JSON object with a `component` (one of the names from GET /health), `parameters` matching that component's schema, optional `rules`, and `outputs`. POST it to /layout/generate to build + verify + export, or /layout/verify to only run design-rule checks. Always read the `verification` block: if `status` is `fail`, fix the offending parameter (see the failing check's value_um vs limit_um) and retry. The supported components today are IDC (interdigital capacitor) and CPW (coplanar waveguide).
